mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for equity valuations, directly compressing forward S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive mean during rate hike periods with statistical significance (p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sudden jump in the unemployment rate above 4.5% signals immediate labor market deterioration, triggering negative equity repricing within 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in >65% of instances when UNRATE exceeds 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in retail sales and housing starts indicate a synchronized consumer demand collapse, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint declines in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict negative 60-day returns with a Rank IC above 0.04.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth exceeding 2% annualized during a monetary tightening cycle signals resilient supply-side capacity that supports positive equity returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth above 2% yields negative 20-day forward returns during tightening periods with p < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate rises faster than the CPI inflation rate, real rates turn positive, suppressing equity valuations and generating negative 20-day forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive real rate differentials correlate with positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth falling below 1.0% annualized confirms economic contraction, forcing equity markets to price in recessionary earnings cuts over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in >70% of quarters where GDPC1 growth drops below 1.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained monthly increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect robust economic activity that supports corporate earnings expectations, producing positive 5-day forward S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Months with positive PAYEMS revisions show negative mean 5-day forward returns with statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production declines alongside rising federal funds rates indicate a supply-demand mismatch that triggers negative equity repricing over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of falling INDPRO and rising FEDFUNDS fails to predict negative 20-day returns with a Rank IC > 0.03.
